title: SOUTH TUIPUI BIALTU MLA, PU JEJE LALPEKHLUA CHUAN WCD - PMKSY 2.0 HNUAIAH KHAW PATHUMA LONEITUTE TAN TANPUINA SEMIN SOUTH CHAWNGTUIAH THINGPUI FE SAWNGBAWLNA TUR A HAWNG BAWK
content:
795/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 1stJune, 2026:Vawiin khan Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua, 29th South Tuipui A/C bialtu MLA chuan District Rural Development Office (DRDO), Hnahthial buatsaihin WCD- PMKSY 2.0 hnuaia loneihna hmanrua (Farm Tools) chu a bial chhunga khaw pathum - Khawhri, Tarpho leh S. Chawngtui te tan a sem a. S. Chawngtuiah hian Thingpui fe sawngbawlna tur - Tea Processing Unit chu a hawng nghal bawk a ni.

Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua chuan DRDO, Hnahthial hmalakna hnuaiah Khawhri, Tarpho leh S. Chawngtui khawtlangten hamthatna bungrua hrang hrang an dawng thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin DRDO hnuaia thawktute chu an thawhrimna leh hmalaknate fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. Loneitute chuan sawrkar atanga an bungraw dawnte chu tangkai taka hmang ngei tura chahin an hnathawhna kawng hrang hranga chhawk zangkhaitu a nih ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk. S. Chawngtui khuaa Thingpui fe sawngbawlna tur - Tea Processing Unit hawn a ni thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin khawtlang mipuite chu chhawr tangkai ngei turin a fuih nghal a ni.

MLA chuan sawrkar-in sawhthing market mumal leh tha zawk a buatsaih avanga thingtlang lo neituten sum tam zawk an la lut thei ta leh MUHCS a kalpui avanga dinhmun harsa zawk ten inenkawlna sum senso tam tak an lo hum thei ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. A bial mipuite ah heng hamthatna hrang hrangte chhawr tangkaitu tam tak an awm chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin a chhawr tangkaitu ni theuh turin mipuite chu a sawm nghal a ni.

WCD - PMKSY 2.0 hnuaia Farm Tools khaw hrang hranga sem zat chu tarlan ang hi a ni :-

1. S. Chawngtui : Brush Cutter - 14 ; Sprayer -9

2. Khawhri : Brush Cutter - 24 ; Sprayer - 5 ; Amla Juicer - 2 ; Turmeric Grinder - 1

3. Tarpho: Brush Cutter - 10 ; Sprayer -11

S. Chawngtui a Tea Processing Unit hawnna leh Farm Tools semna Programme hi Pu HD. Lalpekmawia, PD, DRDO chuan a kaihruai a. Kum 2021-22 atanga kalpui tan, PMKSY 2.0 project chu a lo tawp dawn tak thu sawiin Project kalpuina khua S.Chawngtui, Khawhri leh Tarpho te chuan PMKSY 2.0 atanga hmalakna kawng hrang hrang leh tanpuina an dawn zawng zawngte chu Project tawp ruala tawp ve mai lova, chhawr tangkai chhunzawm tum ngei turin a fuih a ni.

Attachment

title: Governor Reviews Mizoram’s Preparations for 73rd NEC Plenary
content:
134/2026-2027

Aizawl, 1st June, 2026:Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) reviewed Mizoram’s preparations for the 73rd North Eastern Council (NEC) Plenary, scheduled to be held on 4th June, 2026 (Thursday) in Shillong, Meghalaya. The meeting was held this afternoon at the Lok Bhavan Conference Room in Aizawl.

During the review, Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh emphasised the Union Government’s strong commitment to the development of the North Eastern states. He urged all line departments to make every possible effort to ensure that Mizoram’s priorities and developmental needs are effectively addressed during the upcoming NEC Plenary, which will be chaired by the Union Home Minister.

Secretary of the Planning & Programme Implementation Department, Mr. David Lalthantluanga, gave a detailed PowerPoint presentation on the follow-up actions taken on the decisions and initiatives concerning Mizoram from the 72nd NEC Plenary held in Agartala, Tripura, in December 2024. He also briefed the meeting on the current status of various ongoing projects under the NEC and the Ministry of DoNER, including NEC-funded projects, NESIDS (Roads), NESIDS (OTRI) and PM-DevINE projects. The officials also discussed and finalised important points to be raised during the NEC Plenary for the overall welfare and development of Mizoram.

Senior officials who attended the meeting included Mr. Sudhir Kumar, Principal Secretary, GAD; Mr. Udit Prakash Rai, Commissioner & Secretary, Cooperation Department; Mr. Vinod P. Kavle, Commissioner & Secretary to Governor; Mr. V. Lalsangliana, Commissioner & Secretary, Sports & Youth Services Department; Mrs. Ramdinliani, Secretary, Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare Department; Mr. David Lalthantluanga, Secretary, Planning & Programme Implementation Department; Mrs. Maria CT Zuali, Secretary, Horticulture Department; Dr. H. Lianzela, Secretary, Commerce & Industries Department; Dr. YLN Reddy, Secretary, Information & Communication Technology and other senior officials.

Attachment

title: Larsap hovin NEC Plenary atana Mizoram inpuahchahna thlir ho
content:
794/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 1st June, 2026:Vawiin tlai khan Lok Bhavan Conference Room-ah Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) hovin June ni 4, 2026 (Ningani) a North Eastern Council (NEC) Plenary vawi 73-na, Shillong, Meghalaya neih tur atana Mizoram inpuahchahnate thlir ho a ni.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan India hmar chhak state hrang hrangte hmasawnna Sawrkar laipuiin a dah pawimawh thu sawiin, Union Home Minister hova neih tur NEC Plenary-ah Mizoram hmalakna leh mamawhte tha taka thlen a nih theih nan line department hrang hrang hotute theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a ni.

He hunah hian NEC Plenary vawi 72-na, December, 2024-a Agartala, Tripura-a neiha Mizoram kaihhnawih hmalakna tura tih bawhzui a nih dante bakah NEC Plenary, Shillong atana inpuahchahnate Pu David Lalthantluanga, Secretary, Planning & Programme Implementation Department-in Powerpoint Presentation hmangin a sawi fiah a. Heng bakah hian NEC leh Ministry of DoNER hnuaia projects kalpui mek - NEC funded Projects, NESIDS (Roads), NESIDS (OTRI) leh PM-DevINE Projects - chungchangte sawi ho a ni a. Heng bakah hian NEC Plenary-a Mizoram hamthat nana thlen tur pawimawh hrang hrangte sawi ho a ni bawk.

Meeting-ah hian Pu Sudhir Kumar, Principal Secretary, GAD; Pu Udit Prakash Rai, Commissioner & Secretary, Cooperation Department; Pu Vinod P. Kavle, Commissioner & Secratary to Governor; Pu V. Lalsangliana, Commissioner & Secretary, Sports & Youth Services Department; Pi Ramdinliani, Secretary, Agriculture & Farmers' Welfare; Pu David Lalthantluanga, Secretary, Planning & Programme Implementation Department; Pi Maria CT Zuali, Secretary, Horticulture Department; Dr. H. Lianzela, Secretary, Commerce & Industries Department, Dr. YLN Reddy, Secretary, Information & Communication Technology leh official pawimawh dangte an tel a ni.

title: SOLID WASTE MANAGEMENT CHUNGCHANGAH SERCHHIP DISTRICT SPECIAL CELL THUKHAWM; SWM RULES 2026 CHAK TAKA KENKAWH A NI DAWN
content:
793/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 1stJune 2026:Vawiin khan bawlhhlawh sawngbawl dan Solid Waste Management (SWM) chungchangah Serchhip District bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma hovin Special Cell an thukhawm a, May ni 5, 2026-a SWM chungchanga Supreme Court thuchhuakte bawhzuiin, bawlhhlawh sawngbawlna kawnga hmalak meknate enletna leh sawi hona neih a ni.

Deputy Commissioner Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan Serchhip District chhungah bawlhhlawh sawngbawl kawngah SWM Rules, 2026 tlawhchhana chak taka hma lak mêk a nih thu a sawi a. SWM Rules ngai pawimawh lo leh zâwm lote chu Supreme Court thuneihna dodal anga ngaih an nih dâwn avangin, dan bawhchhetute chunga hremna pawh khauh taka kenkawh a nih tur thu a sawi a. Mipuite chu faina kawnga thahnemngai tur leh dan ngai pawimawh turin a chah a; he danin a phut anga mawhphurhna neitu khawtlang hruaitute leh department zawng zawngte pawh, tha taka an mawhphurhna theuhte hlen chhuak turin a sâwm bawk a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Serchhip District khaw hrang hranga bawlhhlawh sawngbawlna kawnga hmalatu tur - Village Solid Waste Management Committee (VSWMC) indin chungchang te, Village Council (VC)-te mawhphurhna leh Special Cell hnuaia department hrang hrangte hmalak mêk dante en ho a ni a, hmalak zui zel dan turte rel a ni bawk.

SWM Rules, 2026 hnuaiah hian bawlhhlawhte chu chi li (4) - Wet Waste (tawih thei), Dry Waste (tawih thei lo), Sanitary Waste (zun leh ek thiarna thil hrang hrang, diaper leh sanitary pads etc.) leh Special Care Waste (rawng bur, damdawi chhia, e-waste etc.) ahte thlair hran tawh tur an ni a. Hmun hrang hrangah tawihthei leh tawih thei lo paihna tur Waste Segregation/Management Center-te sak mek a ni a. A paihna tura hmun bik ruahmanahte chauh hian bawlhlawh paih tur a ni dâwn a, khawlaia bawlhhlawh hal leh paih chu khap tlat a ni dawn bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Discussion Held on Conducting "Be Deputy Commissioner for a Day 2.0" for Students in Lunglei
content:
133/2026-2027

Lunglei, 1 June 2026:A meeting was held today to discuss the conduct of "Be Deputy Commissioner for a Day 2.0", an initiative led by Lunglei Deputy Commissioner Pi Navneet Mann. The programme is designed to provide students with firsthand exposure to the functioning of the Deputy Commissioner's Office and to inspire them to take up responsible leadership roles in the future.

The meeting, chaired by Deputy Commissioner Pi Navneet Mann in her office chamber, was attended by officials from the DC Office as well as representatives from the Education and Information & Public Relations (I&PR) Departments. Participants reviewed the proposed programme schedule and deliberated on various arrangements necessary for its successful implementation.

The first edition of "Be Deputy Commissioner for a Day" was successfully conducted on 27 August 2025, involving six meritorious students selected from various schools. Following its success, the initiative was also extended to Block Development Offices (BDOs) across the district under the title "Be BDO for a Day". For the second edition, ten students from Classes IX and X studying in schools within Lunglei town will be selected. In addition, two students from Classes VI to XII will be given an opportunity to participate through a special Wildcard Entry, under which interested students may submit their entries and two participants will be selected from among them.

As per the tentative programme schedule, the twelve selected students will arrive at the DC Office on 17 June 2026 at 9:30 a.m. in the Deputy Commissioner's official vehicle. They will be introduced to the various responsibilities and functions of the Deputy Commissioner and will visit different office sections, interact with officials, and observe the day-to-day administration of the district. The students will also attend departmental presentations made to the Deputy Commissioner, interact with media personnel, and visit ongoing developmental initiatives such as the Health ATM, Cosmic Class, and Enumeration activities under the ongoing Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Rolls, 2026. Throughout the programme, the participants will be given opportunities to engage with officials and journalists while assuming the role of a Deputy Commissioner.

The initiative is being organised under the Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan (NMBA) as part of efforts to protect and empower students against substance abuse. Through this experience, students will gain a deeper understanding of the functioning of the DC Office, the daily responsibilities of a Deputy Commissioner, and the coordination required with various government departments and the public. The programme is expected to serve as a valuable learning experience, motivating students to pursue their aspirations while reinforcing the importance of staying away from drugs and other harmful substances in order to achieve their goals.

Attachment

title: SPECIAL INTENSIVE REVISION (SIR) 2026 CHUNGCHANGAH 'PRESS BRIEFING' SERCHHIPAH NEIH A NI
content:
792/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 1st June 2026:Vawiin khan Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026 chungchangah Distirct Election Officer, Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan Serchhipa chanchinbumite 'Press Briefing' a neihpui.

Serchhip District Election Officer leh District Bawrhsap ni bawk  Pu Paul L.Khuma  chuan SIR 2026 kalpui mek chu Democracy innghahna lungphum pawimawh em em a nih thu sawiin, India khua leh tui, vote nei theite mi tumah hmaih an nih lohna tur leh, mi tumahin dan dik loa vote an neih lohna tura hma lakna a nih thu a sawi a. Enumeration Form thehlut lote chu Draft electoral Roll-a an chuan ve loh tur thu sawiin BLO ten Enumeration Form an sem mek chu mi tinin lo ngai pawimawh se a duh thu a sawi a.  Serchhip District chu Election hnuhung berah pawh vote tlak thatna ber district (84.9% ) an nih thu sawiin, India ram pum huap ang pawha lehkha thiam, ziak leh chhiar thiam sanna ber an nih angin, tuna SIR 2026 kalpui mekah pawh record tha tak nei tura thawh ho puiah thuthar  thehdartute chu a sawm a ni.

Vawiin-a 'Press Briefing' ah hian Additional Deputy Commissioner Pi Dorothy Lalmuansangi pawhin SIR pawimawhzia sawiin, Census nena ngaih pawlh loh tur a nih thu te, mipui nawlpuiin an hriatthiam theih tura thu ziak hmanga thu thehdarh a pawimawh thute a sawi a; Election Officer Pi Lalchhanhim’n Serchhip district-a SIR kalpui chhoh tawh dan hrang hrangte tarlangin, Press mite hriattur pawimawh hrang hrangte a sawi bawk a, hriat thiam lohte inzawhna leh chhanna hun hman ho a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: INTER MEDIA PUBLICITY COORDINATION COMMITTEE (IMPCC) MEETING HELD IN AIZAWL
content:
132/2026-2027

Aizawl, 1 June 2026:The Inter Media Publicity Coordination Committee (IMPCC), comprising various Central Government media units and selected State Government departments in Mizoram, convened a meeting today at the Conference Hall of All India Radio (AIR), Tuikhuahtlang, Aizawl.

The meeting deliberated on strengthening coordination and collaboration among the Press Information Bureau (PIB), All India Radio (AIR), Doordarshan Kendra (DDK), Department of Information & Public Relations (DIPR), and other media organizations in the State. Discussions focused on enhancing public awareness of various Central Government schemes to ensure that intended beneficiaries receive timely and accurate information. Participants also explored ways to effectively disseminate information on ongoing government projects and their achievements so that the public can gain a broader understanding of developmental initiatives being undertaken.

Recognizing the growing importance of digital communication in today's rapidly evolving media landscape, the meeting emphasized the need to expand outreach efforts beyond traditional print media by leveraging social media platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, and X. Deliberations also highlighted the importance of adopting prompt and effective measures to counter misinformation and ensure that accurate information reaches the public.

The meeting was chaired by Shri Nampibou Marinmai, Director, Doordarshan Kendra (DDK), Aizawl. Smt. Pavni Gupta, Joint Director, Press Information Bureau (PIB), Guwahati, attended the meeting along with representatives from various Central and State Government departments.

title: Lunglei District Bawrhsap hma laknaa zirlai naupangte tana "Be DC for a Day 2.0" (Ni khat atan Bawrhsap) kalpui tur chungchang sawi ho a ni
content:
791/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 1:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann ruahmanna leh hma laknaa Lunglei khawpui chhunga zirlai naupangte'n Bawrhsap hna thawh dan a taka an hriatna tur leh mawhphurhna pawimawh la ngam tura fuih phurtu atana ruahman, "Be Deputy Commissioner for a Day 2.0" (Ni khat atan Bawrhsap thawh hnihna) kalpui dan tur sawi ho a ni.

Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann kaihhruaia a hna thawh pindana ṭhut khawm buatsaihah hian DC officer-te bakah, Education leh I&PR official-te an tel a. Be DC for a Day 2.0 atana hun hman dan tur ruahmanna thlir hovin, thil ṭul hrang hrang an sawi ho.

Be DC for a Day hi nikum August ni 27, 2025 (Nilaini) khan a vawi khatna atan zirlai paruk thlan chhuahte nen hlawhtling taka kalpui niin, Lunglei District chhung BDO ṭhut hmunahte pawh "Be BDO for a Day" tiin kalpui chhunzawm a ni bawk a. Tunah hian a thawh hnihna atan Lunglei khawpui chhunga pawl 9 leh pawl 10 zirlai naupang sawm thlan chhuah leh niin, anni bakah hian hemia tel duh pawl 6–12 inkar zirlai pahnih dang tan tel ve theihna remchang (Wildcard Entry) ruahman tum a ni bawk.

Ruahman lawk dan chuan, June ni 17, 2026 (Nilaini) zing dar 9:30-ah Bawrhsap lirthei hmangin zirlai thlan chhuah 12 te hian Bawrhsap pisa thlengin, Bawrhsap hna thawh dan hrang hrang hrilhfiah an ni ang a. Chumi hnuah pindan hrang hrang fang kualin, thawktute nen an inkawm ang a. Department hrang hrangte'n an hna thawh dan DC-a an report ngaithlain, thu thar theh darhtute nena inkawm hona hun an hman bakah, hmasawnna hna thawh kal mek a hmunah an tlawh bawk ang a. He'ng hun buatsaih hrang hrangah hian zirlaite hian Bawrhsap angin official-te leh journalist-te hi an hmachhawn dawn a ni.

He hma lakna hi Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan (NMBA) hnuaia ruihhlo hman khawlohna laka zirlaite ven himna tura ruahman niin, zirlaite'n DC office hna thawh dan leh ni tina DC-in hun a hman dan te, department hrang hrang leh mipuite nena an indawr dan te an hriat a, hei hi an hma hun atana tum ruhna leh phurna petu atan leh an tum hlen tura ruihhlo laka fihlim a pawimawhzia an zir chhuahna atana tawn hriat pawimawh tak ni tura beisei leh ruahman a ni.

Attachment

title: HEALTH MINISTER PI LALRINPUII’N SERCHHIP A TLAWH
content:
790/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 1stJune 2026: Vawiin khan Health & Family Welfare Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Serchhip tlawhin, District Hospital Serchhip, Mercy Hospital leh Health Department hmalakna hrang hrangte tlawh a, District Medical Superintendent Dr. ZD. Lalmuanawma leh a thawhpuite'n an lo dawngsawng a ni.

Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan  District Hospital Building thar sak mek  a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, chak zawka sak hna pawh  thawh theih dan tur a ngaihtuahpui thu a sawi a. Mipuite mamawhna sang tak Serchhip District Hospital-a Doctor indaih lohna awm thin te, Technician, Nurse leh thawktu dang indaih lohnate pawh tih ziaawm pawh tih ziaawm a nih theih dan tur te, 3D Dental Clinic tih changtlun dan turte bakah damlote  mamawh hrang hrang,  thawktute’n an lo thlente sawi ho a ni.

Vawiin vek khan Serchhip Hospital sak thar chungchangah Serchhip Sub Hqrs YMA hruaitute nen, inkawmna a nei bawkin, chak zawka hna thawh a nih theih nana hma lakpui tur an ngennate a ngaihthlak sak a; CSR fund chungchangah Power Grid Corporation of India Limited lamin MoU an la ziah fel theih loh thu sawiin, Mizoram sawrkar lam chuan an tih tur chin an tih fel vek tawh thu a sawi a, Power Grid lamah pawh chak taka bawhzui zel a tum thu a sawi bawk. Hei bakah hian NESIDS atanga sum hmuh turte pawh hmuh thuai a nih theih nan thuneitute hnenah bawhzui a nih tur thu a sawi bawk.  State Integrated Rehabilitation & Care Centre, Mental Health & Disability Care (rualbanlote leh rilru lam buaite enkawlna hmun bik) Mizoramah neih ve ni se tia an thlen chungchangah pawh Minister chuan, Aizawl district-ah chauh ni lo, district tina dah tura hmalak mek a nih thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Health Minister hian vawiin vek khan New Serchhip Bazar Veng-a Mercy Hospital (Rural Diagnostics & Research Centre) pawh tlawh nghalin, Hospital Ward/Cabin hrang hranga dam lote tlawh kual a; New Serchhip khawtlang hruaitute nen inkawmna nei zuiin, mipui vantlang hriselna kawnga hmalakna tur leh Urban Primary Health Centre leh Sub-Centre te tih hmasawnna tur leh mipuite tan tangkai leh zuala hman a nih theih dan turte sawi ho a ni.

Attachment

title: Reserved Forest Area-a Ram Pass neite hriat tur chungchanga Kolasib DC thuchhuak
content:
789/2026-2027

Kolasib, 1st June, 2026:India rama Dan pui kengkawhtu sang ber, Supreme Court thuchhuak angin Reserved Forest Area chhunga ram te endikna kalpui mek a ni a. He thupek hian district zawng zawng huamin, an huamchhunga land pass pek chhuah tawh, Reserved Forest Area hnuaia rin luhte chu Category - A, B, C leh D ah te thliar hrang  tura tih a ni.

He thupek bawhzui hian Kolasib Deputy Commissioner (DC) Office chuan ni 13 May, 2026 khan Reserved Forest hnuaia rin luh khuate chu an Village Council (VC) te hnenah lehkha thawnin, an khaw chhunga Revenue Pass (Land Pass) zawng zawngte Xerox Copy la khawm a, DC Office-a thehlut (submit) turin a lo hriattir tawh a ni.

Hemi chungchangah hian mipuite chu thlaphang emaw chiai lo tura kan hriattir kan ni a. Reserved Forest Area huam chhunga ram pass neite chuan mahni khaw VC-te hnenah theuh June ni 10, 2026 hma ngeiin kan land pass xerox copy te  thehluh vek tur a ni.

title: Mamit-ah Lok Sabha MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha Mamit hoin DISHA meeting neih a ni
content:
788/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 1st of June,2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah Lok Sabha MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha hoin District Development Co-ordination & Monitoring Committee(DISHA) chu thukhawmin, Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap chuan hun a kaihruai.

Lok Sabha MP chuan Mamit district a DISHA meeting kumina a vawikhatna atana neih a ni thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin line department te hnathawh thlirletna pawimawh tak a ni a, district hmasawn zel turin theihtawp chhuaha mahni mawhphurna hlen theuh turin a chah a ni.

\Vawiin meeting-ah hian Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap chuan DISHA hnuaia schemes hrang hrang department in an kalpui chu power point presentation hmangin sawi zauna hun a nei a, department hnathawh leh hmalaknate thlir ho a ni. Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan department harsatna te ngaihthlak sakin theih anga hmalak pui a tum thu a sawi.

DISHA hi Sawrkar Laipuiin district tina a din a ni a, a tum ber chu Sawrkar Laipuiina schemes hrang hrang a duan-Centrally Sponsored Schemes-te kalpui dan endik leh hmasawn zelna tura thawhohna tha a awm theih nana hmalak dan ngaihtuah hi a ni.

Attachment

title: SAITUALAH WORLD NO TOBACCO DAY 2026 HMAN A NI
content:
787/2026-2027

Saitual, the 1st June, 2026: Kum tin May ni 31-a hman ṭhin vaihlo leh a kaihhnawih ṭhat lohzia inzirtirna ni, 'World No Tobacco Day' (WNTD) chu vawiin khan CMO Conference Hall, Saitualah hman a ni a, Dr. Zothanpari Chhakchhuak, Dy. CMO chu resource person niin, vaihlo that lohzia zirtirna a pe.

He hunah hian Dr. Zothanpari Chhakchhuak, Dy. CMO chuan vaihhlo chi hrang hrang te chu powerpoint presentation hmangin a sawifiah a, ngawlveina intan theih dan te, vaihloin kan taksaa nghawng a neih dan te leh Gutkha that lohna te a tarlang a ni. Dy. CMO chuan vaihhloah hian a zuk chi bikah chemical 7000 chuang awmin, heng zinga 80 te chuan cancer an thlen thei a ni, a ti a, Gutkha lama a hmuam leh ei chiah hian chemical 3000 chuang awmin, 28 vel hian cancer an thlen thei bawk tih a sawi. Zuk leh hmuam ti nasa hmeichhiaah nau chhiat theihna chance a sang a, mipaah chi thlah theih lohna “infertility” a thlen thei bawk a ni, a ti. Dr. Zothanpari Chhakchhuak chuan zuk leh hmuam chu ngawl vei awl “addictive” tak a nih avangin ti ve lo turin zirlai kalkhawm te chu a fuih a, Mizoram chu India ramah a cheng mipuite tam zawng teh a cancer tam berna kan nih tawh avangin zirlaite chu zuk leh hmuam laka fihlim tur leh a that lohzia te midang zirtir turin a chah a ni.

Kumin World No Tobacco Day thupui atan "Unmasking the appeal – countering nicotine and tobacco addiction" tih chu hman a ni a, vawiin Saituala hun hmanna hi Pu Lalngaihzuala, Health Worker in a kai hruai a, Govt, Middle School-2 zirlai naupangte telin, Dr. Zothanpari chhakchhuak, Dy. CMO chuan vaihlo that lohzia zirtirna a pe a, Dr. Rosiamliani Bawitlung, DPM chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Governor Launches Khet Bachao Abhiyan
content:
131/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 1st June, 2026:Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), officially launched the 'Khet Bachao Abhiyan' today at Lok Bhavan, Aizawl. The campaign is an initiative of the Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare, aimed at combating soil degradation by promoting balanced, soil test-based fertilizer application and natural farming methods.

While addressing the gathering, Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh expressed concern over the excessive use of chemical fertilizers and pesticides in pursuit of higher crop yields, which he said has adversely affected agricultural land and human health. He emphasised the urgent need to actively protect and preserve the state’s farmland. The Governor highlighted Prime Minister Mr. Narendra Modi’s National Mission on Natural Farming and stressed the importance of gradually shifting towards natural agricultural practices to safeguard both the environment and the quality of agricultural produce. He underscored the critical role of soil testing to determine nutrient deficiencies so that crops receive the right amount of nutrition. He called upon agricultural scientists and experts to wholeheartedly support and guide farmers in this endeavor.

Noting that Mizoram is heavily dependent on the agriculture sector, the Governor stated that with dedicated efforts from experts and Krishi Vigyan Kendras (KVKs), the state can not only achieve self-sufficiency in food production but also ensure greater income for farmers. He pointed out that Mizoram’s crops are unique due to the continued practice of jhum cultivation on hilly slopes, where maintaining nutrient balance is particularly challenging. He called for continuous training of farmers in modern scientific techniques, strengthening market linkages for better sale of produce and greater emphasis on producing healthy, high-value organic crops.

Dr. Anupam Mishra, Vice-Chancellor of the Central Agricultural University (CAU), Imphal, also spoke on the occasion. He highlighted the need to minimize energy consumption in foodgrain production and stated that the 'Khet Bachao Abhiyan' would focus on creating awareness about important central government schemes and their effective implementation. He also highlighted the importance of Soil Health Cards, Kisan Credit Cards, Farmers’ IDs and Crop Insurance.

During the programme, Dr. Lalnuntluangi Hmar, Dean of the College of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry (CVSc&AH), Selesih, delivered the welcome address. Students from CVSc&AH presented a skit highlighting the importance of the campaign. Dr. K.P. Chaudhary, Principal Scientist and Head of KVK Aizawl, proposed vote of thanks and concluded the event.

The function was attended by Agriculture and Farmers’ Welfare Minister Mr. P.C. Vanlalruata, officials from various line departments and  farmers.

Under the 'Khet Bachao Abhiyan', special focus will be given to reducing the overuse of chemical fertilizers, particularly urea. Throughout the month of June, agricultural scientists, KVK officials and state representatives will conduct seminars and demonstrations to train farmers. The campaign will also promote sustainable farming practices such as green manuring, bio-fertilizers and organic nutrient sources. In addition to improving soil health, it aims to help farmers benefit from various targeted government programmes.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Larsap-in Khet Bachao Abhiyan kalpui tur a hawng
content:
786/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 1st June, 2026:India ram puma June thla puma kalpui tur 'Khet Bachao Abhiyan' chu vawiin khan Mizoram Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan Lok Bhavan, Aizawlah a hawng. Khet Bachao Abhiyan hi Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare kaltlanga lei da zel tur ven kawnga hmalakna a ni a. Hemi hmang hian lei tak dan zirchianna neih hmasak zet hnuah inpawlh rual leh him zawk hmanga lei tha hman bakah leilung nena inrem taka lo neih chu ngaihpawimawh a ni.

He huna thu a sawiah, Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan thar tam duh avanga nasa taka chemical fertilizer leh rannung thahna hlo hman thin ten ram leilung leh hriselna thlenga nghawng tha lo a thlen thu sawiin, hemi laka kan him theih nan hian a taka ke kan pen chhuah a tul tawh a ni, a ti a. Prime Minister Pu Narendra Modi an National Mission on Natural Farming a lo tlangzarh tawh thu sawiin, loneih dan leh thar chhuah a lo him zawk theih nan leilung mila loneih kan chawilar deuh deuh a tul thu a sawi a. Thlai ten an mamawh khawp chaw tha an dawn theih nan lei endikna neih hmasak a pawimawh thu sawiin, hemi kawngah hian agriculture mithiamte chu thahnemngai taka loneitute pui turin a chah a ni.

Larsap chuan Mizoram chu agriculture sector-a innghat nasa tak a nih thu sawiin, mithiamte leh KVK te rawn chunga theihtawp chhuaha hma kan lak phawt chuan ei leh barah kan intodelh mai bakah kuthnathawktute sum lakluh a pung thei dawn a ni, a ti a. Mizoramah tlangram loneih kan la kalpui thu leh loneitute chu tunlai thiamna chhuak thar hman tangkai dan zirtir zel a tul thu a sawi a. Thlai thar chhuah hralhna tha market linkage ngaih pawimawh a tul thu leh thlai hrisel leh ngaihhlutawm organic thlai thar chhuah tamah tan lak lehzual a tul thu a sawi bawk a. Khet Bachao Abhiyan chuan rah tha a chhuah ngei a beisei thu sawiin, duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Dr. Anupam Mishra, Vice-Chancellor, Central Agriculture University (CAU), Imphal-in 'Khet Bachao Abhiyan' chungchang a sawi fiah a. Buh leh thlai thar chhuah kawnga leilung leh mihring tana him lo hman thinte titlem tura tanlak mek zel a nih thu sawiin, Khet Bachao Abhiyan chhungin sawrkar laipui scheme pawimawh leh hman tangkai dan zirtirna kalpui a nih dawn thu a sawi a. Loneitute hmasawn zel nan tanrual a pawimawh thu sawiin, soil health card, kisan credit card, farmers' ID leh crop Insurance-te ngaihpawimawh deuh deuh a tul thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian Dr. Lalnuntluangi Hmar, Dean, College of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry (CVSc&AH), Selesih chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu sawiin, CVSc& AH zirlai ten lemchan hmangin 'Khet Bachao Abhiyan' pawimawhna an entir a. Dr. K.P. Chaudhary, Principal Scientist & Head, KVK Aizawlin lawmthu sawiin hun hman a khar a ni.

Vawiin hun hman hi Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare Minister Pu P.C. Vanlalruata chuan a telpui a. Line department hrang hrang official-te bakah loneitute an tel a ni.

Khet Bachao Abhiyan hmang hian chemical fertilizer, abikin urea hman leh hemia innghah nasat tih tlem tum niin, June thla chhung hian agriculture scientist, KVK official leh state aiawh ten seminar leh ataka entirnate neiin zirtirna an pe thin dawn a. Lo neih dam him leh hrisel zawk a awm theih nan kawng hrang hrangin hmalak a ni ang. Heng bakah hian hlawk zawka thlai thar tura lei hriselna hriat chian pawimawhnate bakah loneitu ten an tana duan hamthatna hrang hrang atanga hlawkna an hmuh theih dan turte inzirtir a ni bawk ang.

title: INTER MEDIA PUBLICITY COORDINATION COMMITTEE (IMPCC) THUKHAWM
content:
785/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 1st June 2026:Vawiin khan central sawrkar media unit hrang hrang leh Mizorama sawrkar department thenkhatte thawhhona IMPCC (Inter Media Publicity Coordination Committee) chu All India Radio (AIR) Conference Hall, Tuikhuahtlangah an thukhawm.

He meeting-ah hian PIB (Press Information Bureau), All India Radio, Doordarshan, Department of Information & Public Relations (DIPR) leh state media hrang hrangte tha zawka an thawhho dan tur sawi a ni a. Central sawrkar scheme chi hrang hrangte pawh a hlawkpuitu (beneficiary) tur ngei beng thleng thei tura hriattirna (awareness) tha zawk a awm theih nan te, sawrkar project thawh mek leh a hlawhtlinna chante mipuiin zau zawka an hriat theihna tura tan lak dan tur sawi ho a ni a. Tunlai khawvel hmasawnnain a ken tel digital media lama tan lak a pawimawhzia te, print media mai ni lova social media platform (Facebook, Instagram, Youtube leh X) atanga mipuite hnena thuthar thehdarh kawnga hma lak pawimawhzia te sawiho a ni a. Thuthar dik lo (misinformation) laka mipuite an chiai loh na tura rang taka hmalak dan kawng te sawiho a ni bawk.

Vawiin meeting hi Doordarshan Kendra (DDK) Aizawl Director Pu Nampibou Marinmai-a’n chairman niin a kaihruai a. PIB Guwahati Joint Director Pi Pavni Gupta chuan rawn telpuiin central leh state sawrkar department hrang hrangte pawh he meeting-ah hian an tel a ni.

title: Champhai District Task Force for Immunization thukhawm
content:
784/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 1st June 2026:Hri danna pek chungchangah vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Keifangtlangah District Task Force for Immunization an thukhawm.

He hun hi Pu Lalbiakfela, Addl. DC chuan kaihruaiin Dr. Lalramhluna, District Immunization Officer (DIO) chuan kum 2025 - 2026 chhunga Champhai District-a vaccine hrang hrang an pekchhuah dan report a tarlang a, HVP Vanccine hi thla thum chhunga kalpui turin India ram ah launch niin Champhai District ah naupang kum 14 leh 15 mi 786 te ah vaccine hi pek turin ruahmanna siam niin 819 pek an ni thung tih a tarlang a, January atanga May thla chhung khan Champhai District ah sentut hri vei nia rinhlelh mi 27 an awm a, enkawl dam tawhte pawh a tarlang nghal.

Dr. Lalhlimpuii, Survillance Medical Officer, WHO hnen atangin Sentut leh Rubella chungchanga WHO in hma alo lak tawh dan a tarlang a, WHO chuan kum 2025 khan khawvel pumah Sentut hri umbo tura a lak thu a sawi a, Mizoram ah pawh he hri umbo tura hma an lakna te a tarlang bawk. Hei bakah hian SMO Dr. Lalhlimpuii chuan naupang in vaccine a lak that loh chuan sentut hri hi a vei ngei ngei a ngaih a nih thu tarlangin ngaihthah a nih chuan thihna hial a thlen theih dan a tarlang a, kum 2025 khan Zokhawthar a raltlan naupang 45 laiin an kai thu a sawi a, thawktuten theihtawp an chhuahna zarah Zokhawthar khawchhungah hri hi a lut lo hlauh tih a sawi tel bawk. Naupangin sentut hri danna an lak that loh vanga hri an vei chuan sentut hri hian mi var a thlen a, tihdam theih a ni tawh lo thin, a ti.

Kum 1 hnuai lamin hri danna an lak that loh chuan Hepatitis B vei theihna chance sang tak an nei a, Hepatitis B hi a vannei chuan harsatna em em nei lovin an damchhungin benvawn angin an pai reng thei a, a vanduai chuan zu in miah lo pawhin thin ro a thlen theih bakah thin cancer te a thlen theih thu a tarlang a, Hepatitis B bakah Pneumonia pawh a thlen thin dan tarlang bawkin heng zawng zawng atanga kan fihlim theihna turin thawktuten theihtawp an chhuah leh zual a tul thu a sawi a, hri danna naupang tam thei ang berin an lak theihna tura thawkho a, tangrual turin kalkhawmte a chah a ni.

Thukhawm chuan Sub-National Immunization Day hman dan tur chungchang an sawiho a, he ni hi July ni 1, 2026 ah hman tum a ni a, he ni hian a tum ber chu zeng hri umbo niin Mizoram a umbo ni mek hi umbo zel a nih theihna tura hmalak chhunzawm zel chu a tum ber a ni a, naupang kum 5 hnuailam zawng zawngte chu zenhri danna hi pek an ni leh dawn a, hlawhtling taka vaccine hi pekchhuah a nih theihna turin mahni theihna zawn theuhah tan lo la turin kalkhawmte a chah bawk.

Thukhawm chuan Champhai District ah Sentut hri a darh hluai lohna tura hmalak dan tur an sawiho nghal a, hemi atana pawimawh ber chu nu leh pate an nih thu leh sentut hri ni awm a lang an faten an vei a nih chuan rang taka inentir nghal a pawimawh thu te thukhawm chuan an tarlang a ni.

title: Excise Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan NCB atanga motor dawnte Central YMA kutah hlan
content:
783/2026-2027Aizawl, the 1st of June, 2026:Narcotics Control Bureau, Ministry of Home Affairs atanga ruihhlo donaa hman tur motor dawn chu vawiin khan Excise & Narcotics Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Central YMA kutah a hlan. Vawiin chawhma dar 10:00 khan Conference Hall, Commissionerate of Excise & Narcotics-ah inhlanna hun hi siam a ni a, Bolero Camper leh Eeco Van pathum ve ve hlan nghal niin, Bolero Camper pathum dang chu kawngah a thang mek bawk a ni.

Excise Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan ruihhlo do kawnga thawhhlawk tak, Mizote tana pawl chhuanawm ni bawk YMA kutah an mamawh tak mai lirthei hlan a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. “Vawiin hi ni chhinchhiahtlak tak a ni. Ruihhlo donaah pawl hrang hrangin kan tih theih leh thatna zawn te, kan thil neih te a inang lo a. Kan theihna zawnah, kan hunlai theuha theihtawp kan chhuah hian kan ramin a chhawr a, Mizoram tan a hlu a ni” tiin, mahni insengsoa ruihhlo donaa hma la thin Central YMA hotute chungah lawmthu a sawi.

Minister chuan Sawrkar hmalakna hrang hrangah mipuiin neitu rilru an put loh chuan hlawhtlin a har tih sawiin, “Tourism leh Sports ah pawh kan infrastructure thahnem tak chu Public-Private-Partnership (PPP) kaltlangin mimal leh pawlin an enkawl mek a, PPP hi uar chhoh zel kan tum. Ruihhlo dona kawngah pawh tun aia hmasawn tur chuan department, YMA leh mipui kan tanrual zel a ngai a ni.” a ti. NCB Director General Pu Anurag Garg nen ruihhlo do kawnga Mizoram mamawh hrang hrang sawiin July 1, 2025 ah New Delhi-a inkawmna hun tha tak an neih thu a sawi bawk.

Central YMA President Pu R. Lalngheta pawhin Excise & Narcotics Department leh CYMA inkara thawhhona tha tak awm chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. “Thawhhona tha zawk kan neih zel ka beisei a. Dan hriatna chungchang leh thildangah pawh department in min finchhuah zel ula, a tul chuan zilhhauna pawh dawng turin kan inhawng a ni.” a ti.

Pu T. Lalramzauva, Deputy Commissioner, E&N Department chuan report a pe a. March 15, 2025-a Home Minister Pu Amit Shah-a’n Mizoram a rawn tlawh tuma Central YMA in dilna an thehluh kal zel atanga motor te chu lei a nih thu a sawi. Ministry of Home Affairs thurawn angin dilna chu Excise & Narcotics Department kaltlanga thehluh niin, January 21, 2026 khan Bolero Camper paruk leh Maruti Eeco Van pathum lei nan cheng nuai 88.95 phalna hmuh a nih thu a tarlang a ni.

Vawiina motor inhlanna hun hi Pu C. Lalruaia, Secretary, Excise & Narcotics Department in a kaihruai a. Excise Commissioner Pu Z. Lalhmangaiha, officer leh staff te bakah Central YMA hruaitu engemawzat an tel a ni.

title: AFRICAN SWINE FEVER (ASF) HRILENG CHUNGCHANGA DEPUTY COMMISSIONER MAMIT THUPEK CHHUAH
content:
781/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 1st of June, 2026:Mizoram hmun hrang hrangah Vawk pul hri African Swine Fever (ASF) leng te a zia awm ta deuh a hriat a ni a. Amaherawhchu, he hri hi engtik lai pawha pung hluai thei reng anih avangin, ASF laka Mamit District kan lo him theihna turin thupek chhuah tula hriat a ni.

Chuvangin, Pu SUVIGYA S CHANDRA, IAS, District Magistrate, Mamit District chuan Section 163, Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS), 2023 in thuneihna a pek angin a hnuaia mi ang hian khapna thupek a chhuah.

1) Mamit District chhungah ramdang (foreign countries) leh State dang atangin vawk, vawksa rep leh vawksa atanga siam lakluh khap tlat a ni.

2) ASF infected area/District danga ASF lenna atangin vawk, vawksa leh a rep atanga siam ei tur Mamit District chhunga lakluh khap tlat a ni.

3) Vawk neitu ten vawk damlo an hralh/talh tur a ni lo.

4) Vawk damlo nei chuan a rang thei ang berin District Veterinary Hospital-ah emaw mahni khua theuha VFA/VC te hnenah emaw an report thin tur a ni.

\5) Vawk thi reng reng Chinai thi/Bleaching Powder nen thuk taka phum tur a ni a, khamah leh ramhnuaiah paih mai mai tur a ni lo.

6) Vawk thi a awmin a neitute'n A.H & Vety Department, Mamit hriattir vat tur a ni.

He thupek bawhchhetute chu Section 223, Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS), 2023 hmangin hrem theih an ni ang. He khapna thupek hian, tihdanglam emaw hnuhlet emaw a nih loh chuan, chhuah a nih atanga thla 2 (hnih) chhung a huam ang.

title: CHIEF MINISTER ATTENDS MEETING-CUM-WORKSHOP FOR DEPARTMENTS USING SNA SPARSH
content:
129/2026-2027

Aizawl, 1 June 2026:A Meeting-cum-Workshop on SASCI and SNA SPARSH was held today at the Planning & Programme Implementation Conference Hall for Administrative Heads of Departments using SNA SPARSH. The programme was attended by Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, who also holds the Finance portfolio.

Speaking on the occasion, the Chief Minister stated that with the rapid advancement of technology, the mechanisms for receiving and utilizing Central funds have also become increasingly sophisticated. These developments are intended to make financial management more efficient and convenient.

As SNA SPARSH serves as the principal platform through which the State receives and manages a significant portion of its funds, it is essential that all concerned departments have a clear understanding of its functioning. He noted that the meeting-cum-workshop was organized to ensure that the system is implemented more effectively this year than in previous years.

The Chief Minister highlighted that Mizoram received an incentive of Rs. 350 crore under SASCI Part 9 for Efficiency in Financial Management owing to its good performance and coordinated efforts during the previous year. He expressed the State Government's determination to secure all reform-linked incentives available under various components of SASCI during the current year as well.

To facilitate this objective, the Government of Mizoram has delegated financial powers to all Administrative Heads under the Charter of Financial Advisers. This, he said, would streamline and expedite the issuance of Administrative Approvals and Expenditure Sanctions.

He further emphasized an important lesson learned from previous years: once a mother sanction is received, funds must be utilized promptly and SNA SPARSH accounts must be closed in a timely manner. This also requires Administrative Heads to ensure that Utilization Certificates are prepared and submitted without delay. He urged all departments to remain prepared and proactive in this regard.

The Chief Minister also informed the participants that under the revised implementation framework of SASCI Part 9, all schemes will need to be executed through the Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) mode. This requirement will extend to State Welfare Schemes as well, making it necessary for all departments to adopt the DBT system.

He also noted that under the ongoing SASCI programme for 2026–27, Mizoram stands to receive incentives amounting to Rs. 650 crore under Parts 4 and 9. Since these incentives would significantly benefit the State, he called upon all departments to work collectively and diligently to ensure that the State secures the full amount available. He urged participants to make the workshop productive and beneficial.

The workshop was jointly organized by the Institute of Government Accounts & Finance and the Finance Department, Government of Mizoram. The programme was chaired by Pu Vanlaldina Fanai, Commissioner, Finance. Following the inaugural session, experts delivered technical presentations and training sessions on the subject.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER HOVIN SNA SPARSH HMANG DEPARTMENT TE TAN MEETING CUM WORKSHOP BUATSAIH A NI
content:
780/2026-2027

Aizawl the 1st June 2026:Vawiin khan Planning & Programme Implementation Conference Hall-ah SNA SPARSH hmangtu Department Administrative Head-te pualin SASCI & SNA SPARSH chungchang Meeting cum Workshop buatsaih a ni a. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, Finance Minister ni bawk chuan a telpui.

Thusawiin Chief Minister chuan, technology thar lo chhuak zelah central fund kan dawn dan leh a hman dan kalphung pawh a lo changkang ve zel a. Hei hi awlsamna min thlentu tur an ni.

SNA SPARSH pawh hi kan sum hnar lian ber kan kalpuina anih angin a hmangtu Department ten chiang taka kan hriat a tul a. Kum liam ta aia kuminah tha zawka kan kalpui theih nan meeting cum workshop pawh hi kan buatsaih a ni.

Nikum khan kan thawhhona a that avangin SASCI Part 9 ah Efficiency in Financial Management incentives Rs. 350 Crore kan dawng a. Kuminah hian SASCI Part tina reform-link incentive awm zawng zawngte dawng thei khawpa tan lak kan duh.

Chutianga kan kal theih nan chuan Mizoram sorkar chuan Administrative Head zawng zawngte chu Charter of Financial Advisers hnuaiah (Financial power) thuneihna pek an ni a. Hei hian Administrative Approval leh Expenditure Sanction pek chhuah kawngah awlsamna min thlen dawn a ni.

Tin, kum hmasa lam atanga kan tawn hriat pawimawh tak chu Mother sanction kan hmuh tawh chuan a hun taka pawisa hman chhuah a, a hun taka kan SNA SPARSH Account kan khar (close) theih a ngai, tih hi a ni a. Administrative head ten a hun taka Utilization Certificates kan peih ngei ngei a ngai tihna a ni a. Lo inpeih thlap zel turin kan chah che u a ni.

SASCI Part 9 kalpui dan tharah Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) zela scheme tinte kan kalpui a ngai dawn a, State Welfare Scheme pawh a huam vek a; department zawng zawngin DBT mode kan hman vek a ngai tih hria ang u.

Tun SASCI kal mek (2026-27) a Part 4 leh Part 9 ah hian Mizoram tana incentive (thawh that vanga dawn belh theih) hmuh theih Rs. 650 crore a awm a. Kan state tana thatpui dawrh theih thil a nih avangin hmu thei ngei turin kan tang tlang dawn nia, a ti a. Workshop tangkai taka hmang turin a chah a ni.

He workshop hi Institute of Government Accounts & Finance leh Mizoram sorkar Finance Department te tangkawpin an buatsaih a ni a. Pu Vanlaldina Fanai, Commissioner, Finance in a kaihruai a, a hawnna neih zawh hian mithiamten zirtirna an pe zui a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah World No Tobacco Day 2026 hman a ni
content:
779/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 1:Kum tin May ni 31-a hman ṭhin vaihlo leh a kaihhnawih ṭhat lohzia inzirtirna ni, 'World No Tobacco Day' (WNTD) chu National Tobacco Control Programme (NTCP), Lunglei District huaihawtin nimin, May ni 31, 2026 (Pathianni) khan BKHP Chhawmdawlna In, Melte, Serkawn, Lungleiah hman a ni a. Lunglei District Senior Chief Medical Officer (SCMO) Dr Lalrinthangi chu Khuallian a ni.

Khuallian SCMO Dr Lalrinthangi chuan vaihlo zuk leh hmuam chu ruihhlo ti tura kailawn hmasa ber a nih thu sawiin, miin vaihlo a tih tawh chuan thluakah ngawl veina siamin, sim a har thu a sawi a. Taksa leh rilru hrisel nan vaihlo leh a kaihhnawih laka inthiar fihlim turin mipuite a chah.

Lungleia WNTD 2026 puala hun hman hi Deputy CMO Dr Vanlalngheti'n a kaihruai a. Thupui atan "Unmasking the appeal – countering nicotine and tobacco addiction" (Tawktarh îtawm phèna túr – vaihlo ngawl veina do lêt) tih chu hman a ni.

NTCP Lunglei District Consultant Dr Lalnunsiama Renthlei chuan powerpoint presentation hmangin vaihlo zuk leh hmuamin mihring taksaa nghawng ṭha lo a neih theih dan hrang hrang zirtirin, vaihlo túr (nicotine) hna thawh te, e-cigarette (túrtuibúr) zûk ṭhat lohzia leh vaihlo sim dan kawng hrang hrang a sawi a. NTCP Lungleia Social Worker Pu Vanlalruata'n lawm thu sawiin hun a khar.

NTCP Lunglei District hma laknain kum 2025–2026 chhung khan vantlang puipunna hmun leh pisaah mei zu an awm leh awm loh endikin Anti-Tobacco Squad Drive ṭum 75 kalpui a ni a. Zirna in hrang hrangah vaihlo ṭhat lohzia inzirtirna (awareness programme) ṭum 13 buatsaih niin, vaihlo khap leh khuahkhirh  chungchang training ṭum 7 buatsaih a ni bawk a. Zuk leh hmuam nghei duha Civil Hospital Lunglei OPD No. 11-a Tobacco Cessation Clinic pantu mi 523 an awm bawk.

Attachment

title: SERICULTURE MINISTER-IN BUL  TIAK 20000 MUGA PANGANG KHAWINA TUR CHU A VAI LIAM
content:
778/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl 1st June, 2026:Tukin dar 7:00 khan Sericulture Minister Pu Lalthansanga’n muga pangang khawina tur atana Central Silk Board, Boko, Guwahati nursery atanga lak chhuah Bul tiak 20000 (singhnih) chu Mualpheng leh Keifanga Progress Partners mi 41 te phun turin Directorate of Sericulture, Chaltlang atangin a vai liam.

Heng bul tiak te hi acre (tin) 61 hmun vel a zauva phun tur a ni a, Hand Holding scheme hnuaiah Sericulture Department leh Mizoram Khadi and Village Industries Board tang kawp (joint venture) project hi Saitual District khua Mualpheng leh Keifangah te kalpui mek a ni.

Minister chuan Mizoram chu Muga pangang khawi lamah hmun tha a ni tih a sawi a, Progress partner ten tha taka Bul kungte chu enkawl puitling turin duhsakna a hlan bawk. Bialtu MLA Prof Lalnilawma'n a enkawl puitlin kawnga an mamawh em em Community water tank a dah sak dawn avang pawhin lawmthu a sawi a. May ni 3, 2026 a Mizoram rawn tlawhtu, Pu Giriraj Singh, Union Textile Minister pawhin district 4 (Lunglei, Champhai, Saitual leh Siaha) ah te nasa leh zuala Muga silk pangang khawi nan fund Mizoram tan a pek a tiam tawh tih a sawi bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Sericulture Secretary Pi Florence Zotluangpuii pawhin thu sawiin, Ministry of Textiles, Government Of India pawhin Sericulture Deptartment a rawn ngaih pawimawhzia leh thawktute pawh ṭhahnemngai taka mahni hna ngai pawimawh lehzual turin a fuih a ni.
